revision_summary:
Four targeted fixes required before Stage 3 is production-ready:

1. SPEAKER ATTRIBUTION FIX (multi_touch_patterns[1] and cherry_pick_moments[3], ts 05:34): The quote 'five year old roof on there. Okay. Perfect. And the house is probably 20.' merges Dave's words with Bart's interjection. Correct the quote to separate speakers. Also correct the claim that Bart said 'Perfect' to the 20-year house roof — per transcript sequence, Bart's 'Perfect' responds to the 5-year garage roof, not the house roof. The coaching gap (not flagging the 20-year house roof) is still valid but must be re-grounded accurately.

2. SCHEMA REFERENCE CORRECTIONS: (a) cherry_pick_moments[5] (ts 05:43): Replace coaching_philosophy.bill_anchoring with coaching_philosophy.curiosity_over_features or analysis_directives.customer_state_trajectory — bill anchoring does not apply to site suitability self-analysis. (b) cherry_pick_moments[6] (ts 01:26): Replace protocols.spouse_decision with verify.title_co_owners and note this is a schema gap (trust structures not covered). Reduce severity framing — trustee authority is not equivalent to a co-owner who must attend.

3. TEMPORAL ACCURACY FIX (cherry_pick_moments[0], coaching_implication): The suggested flip 'so you already know what solar does to a bill; imagine what it does to $400 a month' is presented as available at 01:06, but the $400 figure isn't disclosed until 02:11. Move the flip coaching point to the 02:11 / 02:14 moment where it is actually available.

4. ADD MISSED MOMENTS: Add at minimum (a) the intro quality gap at 00:04-00:14 (no Tesla framing, no legitimacy establishment per schema intros section) and (b) the 'ComEdair' utility misidentification at 02:02 (unverified utility name accepted without clarification, affects bill collection accuracy). These are concrete, transcript-grounded gaps Stage 3 omitted entirely.
